items.title: The Iran War Permanently Altered the Global Economy
items.summary: The global order has been altered, and economies are unlikely to simply pick up where they left off before the U.S. and Israel began bombing Iran.

items.title: Iran Will Enter Nuclear Talks Feeling Emboldened
items.summary: Despite military setbacks during the war, Tehran is presenting a narrative of victory before negotiations with Washington.
